tasks.title: Configure Address Verification API Key
tasks.description: In Business Manager, go to Merchant Tools > Site Preferences > Custom Preferences > Address Verification. Enter the API key from your address verification provider (Loqate, Experian, etc.).

tasks.title: Select Address Verification Provider
tasks.description: Choose your address verification provider (Loqate or Experian) in the Provider preference.

tasks.title: Set Supported Countries
tasks.description: Enter the ISO country codes for which address verification should be active (e.g., US,CA,GB).

tasks.title: Update Service Endpoint URL
tasks.description: In Business Manager, go to Administration > Operations > Services. Update the 'addressverification.credentials' URL to match your provider's API endpoint.

tasks.title: Verify Cartridge Path
tasks.description: Ensure 'int_address_verification' is included in the cartridge path for your site.

tasks.title: Enable Address Verification
tasks.description: Toggle 'Enable Address Verification' to true to activate autocomplete and verification.

tasks.title: Test in Checkout
tasks.description: Go through the checkout flow and verify that address autocomplete suggestions appear when typing in the shipping address field.
